title: Attention Is All You Need
abstract: Introduces the Transformer architecture and self-attention for sequence modeling.

title: Language Models are Few-Shot Learners
abstract: Studies scaling laws and few-shot behavior in large autoregressive language models.
keywords: large language models; few-shot learning; scaling

title: Training Language Models to Follow Instructions with Human Feedback
abstract: Presents instruction tuning and reinforcement learning from human feedback for aligned assistants.
